digest.en: US President Donald Trump said Iran can "call" him if it wants to negotiate. Israeli Prime Minister escalated tensions with Lebanon, accusing Hezbollah of dismantling the ceasefire. The region sees a surge in violence, with Israel ordering more evacuations in Lebanon and Gaza.
digest.hi: ईरान के विदेश मंत्री 24 घंटे के अंदर दोबारा इस्लामाबाद पहुंचे। अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने कहा कि युद्ध जल्द ख़त्म होगा। ट्रंप ने ईरानी अधिकारियों से बातचीत की संभावना जताई।

articles.title: US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: 'We have all the cards', Trump says Iran can 'call
articles.summary: Iran shared a framework to end the war with Pakistan as the US holds back its envoy. US-Israel-Iran War Ceasefire News Live Updates: Iran shares 'workable framework' with Pak on ending war as US holds back envoy for talks The Times of India.

articles.title: Israel PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling' ceasefire with Lebanon
articles.summary: Israel's Prime Minister claims Hezbollah is dismantling the ceasefire with Lebanon, citing Israel's right to respond to planned attacks under the terms of the extended truce. Israel has been striking targets in south Lebanon almost daily.

articles.title: Abbas loyalists sweep Palestinian elections, including some seats in Gaza
articles.summary: Palestinian elections saw Abbas loyalists sweep to victory, including some seats in Gaza, despite low voter turnout due to the ongoing impact of the genocide. Voter turnout in Gaza remained low due to the ongoing impact of the genocide.

articles.title: Zelenskyy accuses Russia of 'nuclear terrorism' on Chernobyl anniversary
articles.summary: Ukraine's President Zelenskyy accused Russia of nuclear terrorism on the Chernobyl anniversary, following a barrage of over 100 drones launched by Moscow overnight, killing five people across Ukraine.

articles.title: Trump has ‘good conversations’ with Putin, Zelenskyy: report
articles.summary: US President Trump reported having good conversations with Putin and Zelenskyy, describing hatred between the two leaders as ridiculous, but declined to reveal when he last spoke to Putin. The U. S.

articles.title: Amid Iran's Attacks, UAE Called For Help. Israel Responded With Iron Dome
articles.summary: The UAE requested help after Iran's attacks, prompting Israel to deploy its Iron Dome system, which intercepted a barrage of 550 ballistic and cruise missiles and over 2,200 drones. Iran struck the UAE with 550 ballistic and cruise missiles, and over 2,200 drones.

articles.title: Trump says Iran can call US if it wants to negotiate
articles.summary: Trump said Iran can call the US to negotiate. Trump says Iran can call US if it wants to negotiate.

articles.title: What to Know About King Charles and Queen Camilla’s U.S. State Visit Hosted by Trump
articles.summary: King Charles and Queen Camilla will visit the US, hosted by Trump. The British royals are set to arrive on Monday for a visit hosted by President Trump, with a garden party, an address to Congress and a banquet on the schedule.

articles.title: Notes from Central Taiwan: As Trump-Xi nears, once again, the sell out
articles.summary: Trump and Xi are nearing a meeting, sparking concerns in Taiwan. Notes from Central Taiwan: As Trump-Xi nears, once again, the sell out Taipei Times.

articles.title: Colombia highway bomb attack kills 19
articles.summary: Suspected guerrillas detonated explosives on the Pan-American Highway in southwest Colombia, killing 19 people. The region has seen escalating violence over the past few days. Suspected guerillas carried out a deadly explosives attack on the Pan-American Highway in southwest Colombia.

articles.title: Ceasefire cracking, Israel looks to spread area of control in Lebanon, orders more evacuations
articles.summary: Israel ordered evacuations as the ceasefire cracks in Lebanon. Ceasefire cracking, Israel looks to spread area of control in Lebanon, orders more evacuations.

articles.title: Why Israel has escalated attacks in Gaza
articles.summary: Israel escalated attacks in Gaza, expanding control in the strip. Israel escalates attacks and expands control in Gaza Strip, sidelining the new US-backed technocratic administration. Why Israel has escalated attacks in Gaza.

articles.title: Israel and Hezbollah Trade Strikes in Lebanon, as Iran Talks Remain on Hold
articles.summary: Israel and Hezbollah exchanged strikes in Lebanon as US-Iran talks stalled. Cease-fires in Lebanon and Iran are on shaky ground, with military attacks flaring and direct talks between Washington and Tehran to end their war stalled.

articles.title: Iran and U.S. Sink Into Awkward Limbo of ‘No War, No Peace’
articles.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi continued diplomatic efforts over the weekend, but US President Donald Trump scrapped a visit to Pakistan by his envoys, casting doubt on US-Iran peace hopes. The stalemate risks escalating tensions without a deal.

articles.title: Donald Trump Pushes 'Ballroom' Agenda With 'Won't Have Happened' Post On Shooting
articles.summary: Donald Trump claimed he was the target of the attack at a White House briefing. He later posted on social media that the shooting would not have happened if he had been present.

articles.title: Trump, top officials likely target of shooting at White House correspondents’ dinner: U.S. Attorney
articles.summary: US Attorney General says a gunman targeted Trump administration officials. The suspect will be charged with assault and discharging a firearm on April 27, 2026. The suspect will be formally charged in federal court on Monday (April 27, 2026) with assault ‌of a federal officer ​and discharging a firearm in an attempt to kill a ⁠federal officer.

articles.title: US-Iran peace hopes fade despite foreign minister's diplomatic push
articles.summary: US President Donald Trump cancelled a visit to Pakistan by his envoys, undermining Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi's diplomatic push for peace. The move suggests fading hopes for a US-Iran agreement, despite Araghchi's continued shuttle diplomacy.

articles.title: Trump and Saudi Arabia: More Transactional Than Ever
articles.summary: Trump's relationship with Saudi Arabia is transactional. He values their financial support. Trump and Saudi Arabia: More Transactional Than Ever Georgetown Journal of International Affairs.

articles.title: Pogacar outlasts debutant Seixas to claim third straight Liege title
articles.summary: Tadej Pogacar won his third straight Liege title, outlasting debutant Jose Seixas. Pogacar outlasts debutant Seixas to claim third straight Liege title.

articles.title: Italy Vs Switzerland Over Cost To Treat Resort Fire Victims
articles.summary: Switzerland is seeking 100,000 Swiss francs in refunds from Italy for treating resort fire victims. Switzerland is asking for more than 100,000 Swiss francs ($127,000) in refunds. (File). Italy Vs Switzerland Over Cost To Treat Resort Fire Victims.

articles.title: Mali Defence Minister Killed In Bomb Attack As Army vs Separatists War Rages
articles.summary: Mali's Defence Minister was killed in a bomb attack as fighting resumed near Bamako. Fighting resumed Sunday in several areas, including Kita near Bamako, Kidal, Gao and Severe. Mali Defence Minister Killed In Bomb Attack As Army vs Separatists War Rages.

articles.title: ट्रंप बोले- ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर कर सकते हैं बात; फिर नाटो पर भड़के अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति
articles.summary: अमेरिकी राष्ट्रपति ट्रंप ने कहा कि ईरानी अधिकारी फोन पर बात कर सकते हैं। इसके बाद उन्होंने नाटो पर टिप्पणी की और कहा कि यह संगठन पुराना हो गया है। ट्रंप की टिप्पणियों से अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच तनाव कम होने की संभावना है।

articles.title: हमले की कोशिश के बाद ट्रंप ने बताया क्यों जरूरी है बॉलरूम का निर्माण, केस करने वाली महिला पर निशाना
articles.summary: डोनाल्ड ट्रंप ने एक हमले की कोशिश के बाद बॉलरूम के निर्माण की आवश्यकता पर जोर दिया। उन्होंने केस करने वाली महिला पर निशाना साधा और अपनी बात रखी। ट्रंप के बयान की जानकारी सार्वजनिक की गई।

articles.title: चेर्नोबिल हादसे की 40वीं वर्षगांठ पर परमाणु खतरे की चेतावनी, ताजा हमलों में 16 लोगों की मौत
articles.summary: चेर्नोबिल हादसे की 40वीं वर्षगांठ पर परमाणु खतरे की चेतावनी जारी की गई। यूक्रेन और रूस के बीच जंग में 16 लोगों की मौत हुई। खतरे की चेतावनी और मौतों की जानकारी सार्वजनिक की गई।

articles.title: अमेरिका-ईरान के बीच शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार, इस रिपोर्ट में बड़ा दावा
articles.summary: अमेरिका और ईरान के बीच शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार हैं। एक रिपोर्ट में दावा किया गया है कि दोनों देशों के बीच शांति के प्रयास जारी हैं। रिपोर्ट में दी गई जानकारी के अनुसार शांति की उम्मीदें बरकरार हैं।

articles.title: हिल जाएगी दुनिया... गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह
articles.summary: अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध के कारण दुनिया में 3 करोड़ लोग गरीब हो सकते हैं। इससे वैश्विक अर्थव्यवस्था और लोगों के जीवन पर नकारात्मक प्रभाव पड़ सकता है। गरीब हो जाएंगे 3 करोड़ लोग, अमेरिका-ईरान युद्ध बना वजह AajTak।

articles.title: UN की डरावनी चेतावनी, दाने-दाने को मोहताज होंगे 1.1 करोड़ पाकिस्तानी? 10 देशों का बुरा हाल
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने चेतावनी दी है कि 1.1 करोड़ पाकिस्तानी लोगों को दाने-दाने के लिए मोहताज होना पड़ सकता है। यह चेतावनी 10 देशों की स्थिति के बारे में दी गई है। पाकिस्तान में खाद्य सुरक्षा की स्थिति खराब होने की आशंका है।

articles.title: UN ने की भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की सराहना, सिबी जार्ज की हुई अहम बैठक
articles.summary: संयुक्त राष्ट्र ने भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की सराहना की। भारत के स्थायी प्रतिनिधि सिबी जार्ज ने अहम बैठक की और आतंकवाद पर चर्चा की। UN ने की भारत के आतंक रोधी प्रयासों की सराहना, सिबी जार्ज की हुई अहम बैठक Jagran।
